home.seoDescription: Shop Mochirii Cosmetics skincare by routine step, with ingredients, directions, skin types, and product details for every formula.

collectionsIndex.heading: Choose your routine
collectionsIndex.intro: Shop cleansing, hydration, brightening, and nourishing care by routine step.

pages.title: About
pages.bodyHtml:
Mochirii Cosmetics organizes skincare by routine step: cleansing, hydration, brightening, and nourishing care. Compare formulas by skin type, ingredients, texture, and use to build the routine that fits you.

Every product page lists texture, skin types, key ingredients, directions, the full INCI list, warnings, and verified origin details in one place.
pages.seoTitle: About Mochirii Cosmetics | Skincare by Routine
pages.seoDescription: Learn how Mochirii Cosmetics organizes skincare formulas by routine step, skin type, ingredients, texture, and use.

pages.title: Contact
pages.bodyHtml:
Questions about a product, an order, or a store policy? Send us a message below.

For order help, include your order number when available. For product questions, tell us which formula you're considering and what step of your routine you're building.

We'll use the details you provide only to respond to your message.
pages.seoTitle: Contact Mochirii Cosmetics | Product & Order Help
pages.seoDescription: Contact Mochirii Cosmetics for help with a product, an order, or a store policy.

collections.title: Mochirii Cosmetics

collections.seoDescription: Shop all 20 Mochirii Cosmetics skincare formulas for cleansing, hydration, brightening, and nourishing care.

collections.title: Cleanse & Tone
collections.description: Cleansers, makeup removers, and toner for the first steps of your skincare routine.
collections.seoDescription: Shop Mochirii cleansers, makeup removers, and toner for the first steps of your skincare routine.

collections.title: Hydrate & Barrier
collections.description: Lightweight gels and daily moisturizers for soft, comfortable-feeling skin.
collections.seoDescription: Shop Mochirii gels and daily moisturizers for hydration and soft, comfortable-feeling skin.

collections.title: Brighten & Smooth
collections.description: Explore serums, exfoliation, and eye care for a brighter, smoother-looking finish.
collections.seoDescription: Shop Mochirii serums, exfoliation, and eye care for a brighter, smoother-looking finish.

collections.title: Age-Support & Nourish
collections.description: Choose nourishing oils, creams, and serums for moisture, suppleness, and a smooth-looking finish.
collections.seoDescription: Shop Mochirii oils, creams, and serums for moisture, suppleness, and a smooth-looking finish.

copy.description: A fast-absorbing serum with peptides, hyaluronic acid, aloe, and sodium PCA for normal-to-dry skin. Its lightweight texture layers easily and leaves skin hydrated with a smoother-looking finish.
copy.seoDescription: A fast-absorbing peptide serum with hyaluronic acid, aloe, and sodium PCA for hydrated, smoother-looking normal-to-dry skin.

copy.description: A silky facial oil with a plant-derived retinol alternative and a blend of skin-softening oils. Made for dehydrated skin, it leaves the complexion supple and luminous-looking.
copy.seoTitle: Natural Retinol Alternative Oil Serum | Mochirii Cosmetics
copy.seoDescription: A silky facial oil with a plant-derived retinol alternative and skin-softening oils for supple, luminous-looking dehydrated skin.

copy.description: This lightweight serum combines vitamin C and vitamin E with hyaluronic acid and sodium PCA. It adds moisture while helping dull-looking skin appear brighter and more even.
copy.seoDescription: A lightweight vitamin C and E serum with hyaluronic acid and sodium PCA for moisture and brighter, more even-looking skin.

copy.description: A velvety day cream with hyaluronic acid, shea butter, aloe, and betaine. For mature skin, it leaves the complexion moisturized, smooth, and comfortable.
copy.seoDescription: A velvety day cream with hyaluronic acid, shea butter, aloe, and betaine for moisturized, smooth, comfortable mature skin.

copy.description: An everyday moisturizer with hyaluronic acid, aloe, and betaine. It leaves skin comfortably moisturized and sits neatly beneath makeup.
copy.seoDescription: An everyday cream with hyaluronic acid, aloe, and betaine for comfortable moisture that sits neatly beneath makeup.

copy.description: A lightweight gel with hyaluronic acid, aloe, and sodium PCA for normal or mature skin. It adds hydration without a heavy finish.
copy.seoTitle: Double Hydration Boost Gel | Mochirii Cosmetics
copy.seoDescription: A lightweight gel with hyaluronic acid, aloe, and sodium PCA for comfortable hydration without a heavy finish.

copy.description: An oil-gel cleanser that turns milky when water is added. It lifts makeup and daily buildup while plant oils leave sensitive or dehydrated skin soft after rinsing.
copy.seoTitle: Sensitive Skin Oil-to-Milk Cleanser | Mochirii Cosmetics
copy.seoDescription: A silky oil-to-milk cleanser that lifts makeup and buildup while leaving sensitive or dehydrated skin soft and nourished.

copy.description: A fragrance-free remover with oil and water phases that lift makeup and daily residue. Aloe and hyaluronic acid leave skin clean and comfortable.
copy.seoDescription: A fragrance-free two-phase makeup remover with aloe and hyaluronic acid for a clean, comfortable after-feel.

copy.description: A rich night cream with cocoa butter, shea butter, aloe, and sodium PCA. By morning, dry or mature skin feels soft, moisturized, and plump.
copy.seoDescription: A rich night cream with cocoa butter, shea butter, aloe, and sodium PCA for soft, moisturized, plump-feeling dry or mature skin.

copy.description: A rich evening moisturizer with ceramides, hyaluronic acid, shea butter, and aloe for normal-to-dry skin. It adds moisture and leaves skin soft by morning.
copy.seoTitle: Ceramide Barrier Night Cream | Mochirii Cosmetics
copy.seoDescription: A rich evening moisturizer with ceramides, hyaluronic acid, shea butter, and aloe for soft, moisturized normal-to-dry skin.

copy.description: A lightweight gel moisturizer with niacinamide for all skin types. It adds hydration and helps uneven-looking skin appear more balanced.
copy.seoDescription: A lightweight niacinamide gel moisturizer for all skin types that adds hydration and supports more balanced-looking skin.

copy.description: A silky cleansing milk that lifts makeup and daily buildup while keeping dry-feeling skin comfortable. Shea butter and plant oils leave skin soft after rinsing.
copy.seoDescription: A silky cleansing milk with shea butter and plant oils that lifts makeup and buildup while leaving dry-feeling skin soft.

copy.description: A concentrated exfoliating step for skin that looks uneven or congested. Use it as directed to lift surface buildup and reveal a smoother-looking, refreshed finish.
copy.seoDescription: A concentrated exfoliating step for uneven or congested-looking skin and a smoother-looking, refreshed finish.

copy.description: A blend of facial oils with vitamin E for dry or mature skin. The rich texture leaves skin soft, supple, and nourished.
copy.seoDescription: A rich blend of facial oils with vitamin E for soft, supple, comfortably nourished dry or mature skin.

copy.description: A silky moisturizer with Bidens pilosa extract, a plant-derived retinol alternative. Hyaluronic acid, aloe, sodium PCA, and plant oils leave skin smooth and moisturized.
copy.seoDescription: A silky moisturizer with Bidens pilosa extract, hyaluronic acid, aloe, sodium PCA, and plant oils for smooth, comfortable skin.

copy.description: A lightweight toner that clears away the last traces of cleansing. Hyaluronic acid leaves dry or mature skin refreshed and hydrated.
copy.seoDescription: A light hyaluronic acid toner that clears away the last traces of cleansing and leaves dry or mature skin comfortably hydrated.

copy.description: A daily face-and-body cleanser for sensitive-feeling or dehydrated skin. Betaine and sodium PCA leave skin clean and comfortable rather than tight.
copy.seoTitle: Sensitive Face & Body Cleanser | Mochirii Cosmetics
copy.seoDescription: A daily face and body cleanser with betaine and sodium PCA for sensitive-feeling or dehydrated skin.

copy.description: A foaming cleanser that rinses away makeup residue and daily buildup. It leaves skin clean and comfortable across skin types.
copy.seoDescription: A foaming cleanser that rinses away makeup residue and daily buildup while leaving skin clean and comfortable.

copy.description: A lightweight caffeine gel for tired-looking skin, including the under-eye area. Its gel texture layers easily and leaves the complexion looking more rested.
copy.seoDescription: A lightweight caffeine gel for tired-looking skin, including the under-eye area, with a gel texture that layers easily.

copy.description: An eye cream with hyaluronic acid, shea butter, and aloe. It moisturizes the eye area and helps tired-looking skin appear smoother.
copy.seoDescription: A soft eye cream with hyaluronic acid, shea butter, and aloe for a moisturized, smoother-looking eye area.
